sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ofuda and Gohei Attack
special_mechanics.description: Pocky is equipped with ofuda (paper talismans) and gohei (ritual wands) to battle enemies and progress through environments

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources contain game history, regional differences, debug features, and general gameplay description, but no detailed movement physics parameters. This is primarily a scrolling shooter rather than a traditional platformer, so vertical physics data is not applicable. No ROM addresses or technical movement data documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Pocky & Rocky article
